title: Never Manhunt
description: a simple plugin that makes it easier to do manhunts
body:
# Never - Manhunt

Litraly the simplest Manhunt Plugin for 1.20.x and 1.21.x



## -----Commands-----
/Manhunt start (username) | {starts a manhunt and give's all players a tracker compass pointed to the selceted player}

/Manhunt stop | {Stop's the Manhunt and removes all of the tracker compasses



### -----Installation-----
Plugin: download the jar and drag into your plugins folder and restart the server

Fabric: download the jar anf the fabicAPI and drag into your mods folder and restart the server

## You can find me here

youtube - @LoganNever
